Solutions for every
travel business.

From independent home-based advisors to global travel consolidators, Flybeth provides the flexible infrastructure you need to thrive.

Independent agents

Scale from anywhere.

Our standalone portal gives you the same power as a massive boutique agency. Manage world-class itineraries from your laptop with instant ticketing and real-time support.

  • No minimum monthly targets
  • Mobile-responsive interface
  • Commission settlements
  • 24/7 partner support
Learn more
Franchise networks

Command your fleet.

Consolidate multiple sub-accounts under one master dashboard. Monitor revenue, control markups, and centralize your operations across your entire agent network.

  • Sub-account management
  • Hierarchical reporting
  • Custom pricing rules
  • Priority API node access
Learn more

"We've doubled our booking volume without adding a single administrative staff member. Flybeth's automation is unrivaled."

Musa Haruna

CEO, Prestige Travel Group
